user.description: Set up a Sony Bravia TV connected over RS-232. Pick the serial port the TV is wired to — local USB adapters and ESPHome serial proxy ports are listed automatically. Note: Sony's protocol has no handshake, so a wiring problem only shows up later as commands that never get acknowledged.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to open the serial port.

abort.already_configured: This serial port is already configured.
